name: From Geneva: day trip to Gruyères, show dairy and chocolate factory
description: Discover From Geneva: day trip to Gruyères, show dairy and chocolate factory in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover From Geneva: day trip to Gruyères, show dairy and chocolate factory in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Gruyeres: Attractions and picturesque landscape in Switzerland, ideal for day trips in summer.
Gruyere: Discover the picturesque village with historic architecture and vibrant activity.
Gruyere: picturesque view of the mountains and charming architecture in nature.
Gruyère: Cheese dairy with production process and freshly produced cheese in the heart of Switzerland.
Chocolate: A selection of fine chocolate from Gruyere for your chocolate experience
Gruyeres: Relax while strolling through picturesque streets and enjoy the beautiful nature.
Gruyeres: Discover the charming old town with historic buildings and picturesque ambiance.
Chocolate: Fine chocolate pieces and cocoa powder for preparing desserts.
